title: FINAL 2026 Oscar Predictions: BEST PICTURE and BEST DIRECTOR
text: The article provides final Oscar predictions for the 98th Academy Awards ceremony (March 15, 2026) at the Dolby Theater in Hollywood. Best Director Predictions (Ranked): 1. Paul Thomas Anderson – "One Battle After Another" (Warner Bros) - Won major precursor awards including BAFTA, Critics Choice, DGA, and Golden Globes. 2. Ryan Coogler – "Sinners" (Warner Bros) - Secured SAG and other guild awards, but faced significant obstacles. 3. Joachim Trier – "Sentimental Value" (NEON). 4. Chloé Zhao – "Hamnet" (Focus Features) - Second-time nominee after "Nomadland" win. 5. Josh Safdie – "Marty Supreme" (A24). The article emphasizes that as of 2026, "the Oscars have still never awarded Best Director to a Black director," highlighting this as the Academy's "most glaring omission" despite Black-led films winning Best Picture previously.
